_comment: Ahrena MCP: GitHub server config. HTTP-first per lex-mcp §5 (transport preference: HTTP > binary > npx). Both platforms use the official remote endpoint at api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/, so no local Node/binary is required. Env var name GH_TOKEN matches the gh CLI convention and the GitHub MCP server's documented variable. Merged into platform MCP files during install. Do not edit — override via .ahrena/mcp/github.json instead.
